---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Who feels it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the capability you'd like. Include API shape / UX if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why this one is preferred.

## Additional Context

Links, references, prior art, related issues.
